summary: Excellent recording with superb drums and space, highlighted by an outstanding Stagger Lee that captures the special vibe of the Oakland Coliseum show.
review: The reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound and especially love the drumming and the expansive space sections. The performance is praised as a favorite, with the Stagger Lee rendition singled out as the best they've heard, making this a must‑listen for fans despite there being other great shows from the era.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers express strong enthusiasm for both the musical performance and the audio quality, noting gorgeous sound and standout moments; only minor caveats about other better shows keep it just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Comments such as "great recording" and "gorgeous sound" indicate a very clear, balanced capture even though the exact source (soundboard/audience) is not specified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the show as special with strong drumming and expansive space sections, suggesting a cohesive and energetic performance throughout.

band_member_comments.Drums: Positive remarks about the drums and the space jam on this show
